title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LILOAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU, A CHILDREN芒聙聶S HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE LILOAN CHILDREN芒聙聶S HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
118 OG No. 28, 7903 (July 11, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11886, June 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LILOAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU, A CHILDREN芒聙聶S HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE LILOAN CHILDREN芒聙聶S HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established in the Municipality of Liloan, Province of Cebu, a children芒聙聶s hospital to be known as the Liloan Children芒聙聶s Hospital (LCH), which shall be under the direct control and supervision of the Provincial Government of Cebu.

SEC. 2. The hospital shall specialize in children芒聙聶s health care services from prenatal to pediatrics care and nutrition counselling services, immunization, and training classes on children芒聙聶s health for parents.

SEC. 3. Any future increase in bed capacity, health care facilities, service capability, and human resource complement shall be based on the hospital development plan which shall be prepared by the Chief of Hospital of the LCH, in consultation with the Department of Health (DOH).

SEC. 4 The Provincial Government of Cebu shall provide the necessary funds for the establishment of the LCH. The Secretary of Health shall include in the Department芒聙聶s subsidy program, support for the capital outlay requirements of the LCH.

SEC. 5. All laws, executive orders, issuances, rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby modified accordingly.

SEC. 6. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on September 27, 2021 and May 31, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

JUN 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
